## Quality Gate

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I did not delete, skip, mark todo, comment out, or weaken existing important tests to make this pass
- [ ] I did not mock a failed core feature into a false success
- [ ] This change does not mutate production DBs, production APIs, or production user data
- [ ] Fixtures contain no real personal data, customer data, secrets, or production credentials
- [ ] If Supabase tables, RLS, or persistence changed, data-integrity tests were added or updated
